tasks.label: My share of the group project

memory.summary: Teammate_A offered to help, but I'm tired and prefer they do it since they're better. Better not push back.

desires: Not look like I'm dragging my feet or being difficult to Teammate_A tonight.
Get this extra task done before 19:00 so I can finally collapse on the couch and not feel guilty tomorrow.
Keep my head down and avoid any awkward conversations about who actually did the work.

goals.description: Finish my own project share and quickly accept the extra task so I can stop thinking about it tonight.
goals.rationale: If I don't get this done by 19:00, I'll feel guilty tomorrow which ruins my mood. Plus, if I drag my feet now, teammate_A might think I'm being difficult or lazy, which would be awkward.

goals.description: Reply to teammate_A's message saying 'Sure, no problem' immediately to keep things smooth.
goals.rationale: I need to avoid any friction or awkwardness right now. Pushing back on their offer feels risky, and keeping my head down is safer for my social standing.

goals.description: Collapse on the couch at 19:00 and ignore all thoughts of the work afterwards.
goals.rationale: Only important once the immediate guilt cycle is broken. Right now, just getting through the task is enough.

agent.last_reasoning: Avoiding friction is priority; accepting the task instantly prevents awkwardness. Finishing my own share quickly clears guilt, so I'll do it after texting to maintain social safety.
